Recorded for the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) - Medicat search. Press play.
Hi, I'm Manish Agarwal. You're hiring a Chief Revenue Officer (CRO), Medicat because banyansoftware needs to change the slope of its growth curve, and you want an operator who owns the whole engine, GTM through P&L. I took Cadient's EBITDA from 12 to 25 percent in nine months. Here is how I would go about it. In the first thirty days, spend time in the pipeline data and on live calls with the team to understand where. By ninety days, help the team land a steeper, margin-positive conversion curve on a measurable early cohort. If that maps to what you're working on, I would enjoy comparing notes on how I would approach the first ninety days.
